title: Bayesian Workflow for Applied Research
abstract: We describe a practical workflow for building, validating, and communicating Bayesian models in applied settings.

title: Probabilistic Programming and Bayesian Methods for Hackers
abstract: An introduction to Bayesian methods through computational examples and intuitive explanations.

title: Statistical Rethinking: A Bayesian Course with Examples in R and Stan
abstract: A Bayesian statistics course emphasizing generative models, causal reasoning, and model comparison.

title: Deep Learning
abstract: A comprehensive treatment of representation learning and deep neural networks.

title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: The Transformer architecture based solely on attention mechanisms, without recurrence or convolutions.
